classes.name: wagtaildonate.models.donations.AbstractPayIn
documentation:
Pay ins are very similar to one-off donations with an exception of not
supporting Gift Aid and of allowing pay in event details to be stored

methods.name: wagtaildonate.models.pages.EmailParagraphBlock.render_as_text
documentation: Renders the paragraph, then converts the resulting HTML into text.

classes.name: wagtaildonate.models.pages.ThankYouRoutablePageMixin

methods.name: wagtaildonate.models.pages.ThankYouRoutablePageMixin.get_thank_you_data
documentation: Get thank you page content with fallback from the default donation page.

methods.name: wagtaildonate.models.pages.ThankYouRoutablePageMixin.prepare_request_for_thank_you_page
documentation: Save data in session so they can be read by the thank you page.

When a donation is completed, the user is presented with a 'Thank You' page.
The values show on the thank you page will be set on the donation page.
Using RoutablePageMixin, provide the donation pages with the functionality
to render these valuse at /thank-you. Also ensure that the thank you page
can be previewed.

methods.name: wagtaildonate.models.pages.ThankYouEmailMixin.get_thank_you_email_data
documentation: Get thank you page content with fallback from the default donation page.

classes.name: wagtaildonate.models.pages.DonationLandingPageBase
documentation:
The abstract base class for other donation page classes
to extend.

classes.name: wagtaildonate.models.pages.AbstractDonationPage
documentation:
The DonationPage acts as the default Donate page.
Only one of these can exists. It's to ensure that we can
fall back to values not specified on individual
campgain/fundraising pages and also so there is always a
donation method available

classes.name: wagtaildonate.models.pages.AbstractDonationCampaignPage
documentation: Similar to DonationLandingPage but more than one can exist

classes.name: wagtaildonate.models.pages.AbstractDonationFundraisingPayInPage
documentation:
Simple one-off form for fundraising pay-in
This does not require any amount fields so only extends Page

functions.name: wagtaildonate.templatetags.wagtaildonate_tags.payment_methods_assets
documentation: Load assets in HTML for all active payment methods.

functions.name: wagtaildonate.templatetags.wagtaildonate_tags.address_lookups_assets
documentation: Load assets in HTML for the current address lookup.

methods.name: wagtaildonate.views.FrequencyForm.clean_frequency
documentation: If no frequency provided but the default is set, return the default one.

classes.name: wagtaildonate.api.serializers.donations.BaseDonationSerializer
documentation: Base serializer used for pay in, single and recurring donations.

classes.name: wagtaildonate.api.serializers.payment_method.PaymentMethodField
documentation: Retrieve payment method based on its code.

methods.name: wagtaildonate.api.serializers.braintree.BaseBraintreeDonationSerializer.build_billing_data
documentation: Get billing data ready to be added to the transaction.

methods.name: wagtaildonate.api.serializers.braintree.BaseBraintreeDonationSerializer.build_transaction_data
documentation: Build transaction data dictionary to be sent to Braintree.

methods.name: wagtaildonate.api.views.donations.DonationsCreateAPIView.create
documentation:
Only return ID when the donation is created.
https://github.com/encode/django-rest-framework/blob/acbd9d8222e763c7f9c7dc2de23c430c702e06d4/rest_framework/mixins.py#L16-L21

methods.name: wagtaildonate.api.views.donations.DonationsCreateAPIView.perform_create
documentation:
Create donation object after payment method and frequency is correct.
https://github.com/encode/django-rest-framework/blob/acbd9d8222e763c7f9c7dc2de23c430c702e06d4/rest_framework/mixins.py#L23-L24

methods.name: wagtaildonate.api.views.donations.DonationsCreateAPIView.get_payment_method_serializer_class
documentation: Get serializer class for the given payment method and frequency.

methods.name: wagtaildonate.api.views.donations.DonationsCreateAPIView.get_payment_method_serializer_context
documentation: Extra context provided to the serializer class context.

methods.name: wagtaildonate.api.views.donations.DonationsCreateAPIView.create_donation
documentation:
Call payment method serializer to validate and sanitise the input
of the donation specific data; and create the donation object.

methods.name: wagtaildonate.api.views.donations.DonationsCreateAPIView.perform_create_donation
documentation: Save the donation object to the database.

methods.name: wagtaildonate.api.views.donations.DonationsCreateAPIView.get_donation_page
documentation: Get donation page that is associated with the donation.

methods.name: wagtaildonate.api.views.donations.DonationsCreateAPIView.perform_after_create_donation
documentation: Additional tasks that happen after creating a donation.

functions.name: wagtaildonate.utils.rich_text.extract_html_elements
documentation: Extracts HTML elements from a fragment. Returns the plain text representation of the HTML document and an array of elements including their span, type and attributes. For example: text, elements = extract_html_elements("This is a paragraph. This is some bold and now italic text") text == "This is a paragraph. This is some bold and now italic text" elements == [(39, 53, 'i', {}), (21, 53, 'b', {})]
Taken from (Sorry. flake8 made me chop it in half!)

functions.name: wagtaildonate.utils.rich_text.rich_text_to_plain_text
documentation:
Converts rich text field values into plain text.

All HTML tags are removed, blocks are separated by new lines and list items are prefixed.

Doesn't yet handle headings, links or inline formatting.

functions.name: wagtaildonate.utils.braintree.map_status
documentation: Maps the given braintree status into one of the values in get_single_donation_model().STATUS_CHOICES.
